# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent supply chain security.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "myorg/automated-setup-app",
    "description": "Application with automated post-install and post-update setup scripts",
    "type": "project",
    "license": "MIT",
    "minimum-stability": "stable",
    "prefer-stable": true,
    "require": {
        "php": "^8.1",
        "composer/composer": "^2.5",
        "symfony/console": "^6.0",
        "symfony/process": "^6.0"
    },
    "require-dev": {
        "phpunit/phpunit": "^10.0",
        "phpstan/phpstan": "^1.10"
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "autoload-dev": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\Tests\\": "tests/"
        }
    },
    "config": {
        "optimize-autoloader": true,
        "sort-packages": true,
        "allow-plugins": {
            "composer/installers": true
        },
        "secure-http": true,
        "lock": true,
        "audit": {
            "abandoned": "report"
        },
        "preferred-install": "dist",
        "discard-changes": true
    },
    "scripts": {
        "verify-checksums": [
            "@php scripts/verify-checksums.php"
        ],
        "setup-directories": [
            "mkdir -p var/cache var/log var/tmp public/assets/css public/assets/js public/assets/images storage/uploads storage/backups",
            "chmod 755 var/cache var/log var/tmp storage/uploads storage/backups"
        ],
        "download-assets": [
            "@php scripts/download-assets.php"
        ],
        "compile-assets": [
            "@php scripts/compile-assets.php"
        ],
        "generate-config": [
            "@php scripts/generate-config.php"
        ],
        "run-migrations": [
            "@php scripts/run-migrations.php"
        ],
        "clear-cache": [
            "@php scripts/clear-cache.php"
        ],
        "security-audit": [
            "@composer audit --format=plain"
        ],
        "validate-env": [
            "@php scripts/validate-environment.php"
        ],
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@validate-env",
            "@security-audit",
            "@setup-directories",
            "@download-assets",
            "@verify-checksums",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@generate-config",
            "@run-migrations",
            "@clear-cache",
            "@php scripts/post-install-summary.php"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@validate-env",
            "@security-audit",
            "@setup-directories",
            "@download-assets",
            "@verify-checksums",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@generate-config",
            "@run-migrations",
            "@clear-cache",
            "@php scripts/post-update-summary.php"
        ],
        "test": [
            "@php vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml"
        ],
        "analyse": [
            "@php vendor/bin/phpstan analyse src --level=max"
        ],
        "check": [
            "@test",
            "@analyse",
            "@security-audit"
        ]
    },
    "scripts-descriptions": {
        "verify-checksums": "Verify SHA-256 checksums of all downloaded assets against known-good hashes",
        "setup-directories": "Create required application directories with appropriate permissions",
        "download-assets": "Download front-end assets from pinned URLs with TLS verification",
        "compile-assets": "Compile and minify CSS/JS assets for production",
        "generate-config": "Generate application configuration from environment variables",
        "run-migrations": "Execute pending database migrations",
        "clear-cache": "Clear all application caches",
        "security-audit": "Run Composer security audit against known vulnerability databases",
        "validate-env": "Validate that all required environment variables and PHP extensions are present",
        "test": "Run the full PHPUnit test suite",
        "analyse": "Run PHPStan static analysis at maximum level",
        "check": "Run tests, static analysis, and security audit"
    },
    "extra": {
        "asset-manifest": {
            "_comment": "All assets are pinned to exact versions with SHA-256 integrity hashes",
            "assets": {
                "bootstrap-css": {
                    "url": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css",
                    "destination": "public/assets/css/bootstrap.min.css",
                    "sha256": "dpe4yOE+nRINPvo9S/R8CatWGdpHc31vGGhODe124s8="
                },
                "bootstrap-js": {
                    "url": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js",
                    "destination": "public/assets/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js",
                    "sha256": "C6h9dCjP+forb4IImoZ1HNfLRJE/h7MYSuT0TZk0E7o="
                },
                "alpine-js": {
                    "url": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/alpinejs@3.13.3/dist/cdn.min.js",
                    "destination": "public/assets/js/alpine.min.js",
                    "sha256": "igMx7Rnf5FNxFm/BoGIzSECSECDmHEJBHGCGee3EqbQ="
                },
                "htmx-js": {
                    "url": "https://unpkg.com/htmx.org@1.9.10/dist/htmx.min.js",
                    "destination": "public/assets/js/htmx.min.js",
                    "sha256": "UgFbHiOJnBFEdSPMXgSkMbMBNeKOjArSdGnKBdLQJbY="
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
